judge_instructor.role: Verify NIST homework procedure, rubric alignment, and artifact completeness using repo files and OpenCode tools.
judge_instructor.opencode_ui_label_hint: Nemotron 3 Super Free — OpenCode medium (or equivalent free tier)
judge_instructor.verification: Call OpenCode tool opencode_provider_models with your configured providerId to list exact modelID strings; adjust if your install uses a different provider slug.
